description_long: This advertising board features a rectangular, chalkboard-style display mounted on a freestanding, foldable metal frame. The front surface is decorated with colorful, hand-drawn illustrations and text, showcasing various food items such as croissants, pizza, chicken, coffee, and soup, with each word rendered in a different color and font style. The board is bordered by a thin, light-colored outline, giving it a classic café or bistro appearance. The supporting structure consists of two slender, black metal legs connected by horizontal bars for stability, visible from the side and rear views. The overall design is lightweight and portable, suitable for temporary placement on sidewalks or near storefronts. No visible illumination or electronic features are present, emphasizing a traditional, analog presentation.
description: A freestanding, chalkboard-style advertising board with colorful food illustrations and text, supported by a slim black metal frame. The design is classic and portable, ideal for sidewalk or storefront use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full chalkboard display with colorful food illustrations and text, bordered by a thin outline.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim, black metal frame and foldable, easel-like support structure, with no visible display content.
description_view_2: Rear view of the board, showing the plain black back panel and the supporting frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the frame's thin profile and support bars.
attribute_frame_design: thin black metal frame with rectangular shape and minimal decorative elements
attribute_advertisement_content: static chalkboard display with colorful hand-drawn food illustrations and menu text
